title: cynorkis tenuicalcar subsp. onivensis
intro: Cynorkis tenuicalcar subsp. onivensis is a rare and lesser-known orchid species. It is primarily found in the tropical regions of Madagascar and is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant has been reported to have antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which can help in treating various health issues, including fever, respiratory problems, and gastrointestinal disorders. Cynorkis tenuicalcar subsp. onivensis can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and its health benefits include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system.
